summary: Completed testing of 5 new features for Interview Platform iteration 4. All backend tests passed (9/9), and all frontend features verified working. Fixed a minor UI bug with back buttons being blocked by decorative overlay.

ui_bugs.issue: Decorative overlay div was intercepting pointer events on back button
ui_bugs.status: FIXED - added pointer-events-none to overlay div

backend: Login with valid credentials (200) - returns token
frontend: Login page desktop back button (data-testid='login-back-btn') navigates to homepage
Login page mobile back button (data-testid='login-back-btn-mobile') navigates to homepage
Signup page desktop back button (data-testid='signup-back-btn') navigates to homepage
Signup page mobile back button (data-testid='signup-back-btn-mobile') navigates to homepage
Landing page footer does NOT contain: Careers, Blog, Press, Help Center (correctly removed)
Landing page footer DOES contain: About Us, Contact Us, Donate Us, Feedback, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Cookie Policy
ResumeSetup Step 1: File upload displays filename after upload
ResumeSetup Step 2: Config section with num_questions select (data-testid='num-questions-select')
ResumeSetup Step 2: Config section with time_per_question select (data-testid='time-per-question-select')
ResumeSetup Step 2: Interview Preview summary shows type, resume filename, questions, time
Dashboard shows Role-Based and Resume-Based interview options
RoleSetup 4-step wizard: Step 1 shows 6 role cards and 'Step 1 of 4'

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new features from iteration 4 tested and working: (1) ResumeSetup 2-step wizard with file upload + config, (2) Auto-navigate tested via code review - uses setAnsweredQuestions with findIndex pattern, (3) Whisper transcript field returned in /api/recordings/upload, (4) Footer cleanup verified - removed links not present, (5) Back buttons on Login/Signup working on both desktop and mobile. Backend tests in test_new_features_iteration4.py. 'Send Feedback to Email' remains MOCKED (UI-only placeholder from previous iteration).

mocked_apis.Send Feedback to Email: UI-only placeholder, shows toast confirmation, no backend email service

features_verified.resume_2step_wizard: Step 1 uploads file, Step 2 configures num_questions and time_per_question with Interview Preview summary
features_verified.whisper_transcript: POST /api/recordings/upload returns 'transcript' field (null for invalid audio, actual transcript for valid audio)
features_verified.footer_cleanup: Removed: Careers, Blog, Press, Help Center. Kept: About Us, Contact Us, Donate Us, Feedback, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Cookie Policy
features_verified.login_signup_back_buttons: Desktop and mobile variants work, navigate to homepage
features_verified.auto_navigate_after_response: Code uses setAnsweredQuestions with findIndex to auto-navigate to next unanswered question after saving response

bug_fixed.issue: Login/Signup desktop back buttons were blocked by decorative overlay div
bug_fixed.root_cause: The div with 'absolute inset-0 opacity-10' was positioned over the button and intercepting pointer events
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'pointer-events-none' class to the overlay div in both Login.js and Signup.js
